name: Pennsylvania Pepper Cabbage (Cole Slaw)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the shredded cabbage, chopped pepper, and salt in a bowl.
2. Let the mixture stand for about 1 hour to allow flavors to meld.
3. Drain off any excess liquid from the mixture.
4. Pour the hot salad dressing over the cabbage and mix well until evenly coated.
5. Serve immediately.
